_meta.description: SOC Framework regression map. Maps changed components to the tests that must pass. Used by socfw_test_runner.py to select minimum viable test set for a given change.

SOCCommandWrapper.reason: Core execution engine — all smoke tests must pass

run.note: SOCCommandWrapper is the execution core. Any change here requires all three email scenarios plus the full unit suite.

SOCFrameworkActions.reason: Action routing table — any change affects all Universal Command calls

run.note: Run Actions contract tests + smoke tests for affected product categories.

SOCFWFeatureFlags.reason: Feature flag list — controls optional capability gates

run.note: Static contract check only — verify all flags default false and descriptions present.

Foundation_Normalize_Email.reason: Email context normalization — sets SOCFramework.Email.* for all email playbooks

run.note: Any change to Normalize Email affects the entire email chain. Run all three email scenarios.

Foundation_Product_Classification.reason: Product category routing — classifies every alert

run.note: Classification affects all product categories. Run SC-01 to verify Email routing still works.

SOCProductCategoryMap.reason: Dataset-to-category mapping — controls product classification routing

run.note: Static check only — verify all entries have required keys and valid category values.

Email_Analysis_Chain.reason: Email analysis workflow — verdict and response recommendation chain

run.note: Run all three email scenarios. SC-01 exercises URL path. SC-02 exercises attachment path. SC-03 exercises benign/FP path.

Email_CEF_Chain.reason: Email C/E/R chain — Shadow Mode execution path

run.note: SC-01 exercises the full malicious path through Containment → Eradication → Recovery. Verify Shadow Mode warroom entries appear correctly.

Endpoint_Analysis_Chain.reason: Endpoint analysis chain — verdict and detonation path

run.note: SOC_Endpoint_Verdict_Resolution_V3 now calls soc-detonate-file via UC. Run detonation unit tests. Add endpoint smoke fixture in next cycle.

Identity_Chain.reason: Identity chain — most complete non-email chain in production

run.note: Identity smoke fixture not yet built — manual tenant test required. See TOOLING.md backlog BL-005.

NIST_Lifecycle_Orchestrators.reason: Top-level lifecycle orchestrators — changes affect ALL product categories

run.note: HIGHEST IMPACT change. Run full static validation on entire NIST IR pack + all three email scenarios. Also run Identity chain manually.

value_tags.reason: Value Metrics Dashboard source — affects all metric calculations

run.note: Static validation only. Verify NDJSON parses, no duplicate tags, new action tags map to valid Value Driver categories.

SC-02.description: Malware attachment — delivered not clicked, no campaign

IDENTITY-SC-01.note: Fixture not yet built. Run manually in dev tenant.

always_run.description: These checks run on every commit regardless of what changed.
always_run.note: SOCCommandWrapper unit tests are fast (<1s) and catch regressions in the execution core.
